ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launched_on" TEXT /* Launch date of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being analyzed */,
  "total_vol" REAL /* Total trading volume of the cryptocurrency for the day */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the recorded data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency at the beginning of the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency at the end of the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency during the day */,
  "positive" REAL /* Percentage of positive sentiment from social media */,
  "negative" REAL /* Percentage of negative sentiment from social media */,
  "neutral" REAL /* Percentage of neutral sentiment from social media */,
  "total_tweets" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets evaluated for sentiment analysis */,
  "total_posts" INTEGER /* Total number of social media posts evaluated for sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sentiment entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being analyzed */,
  "positive" REAL /* Percentage of positive sentiment */,
  "negative" REAL /* Percentage of negative sentiment */,
  "neutral" REAL /* Percentage of neutral sentiment */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date for which the sentiment is reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment data (e.g., Twitter, Reddit, Facebook) */,
  "total_data_points" INTEGER /* Total number of data points used for sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, viewer) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, sentiment change) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Reddit, Facebook) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency related to the data */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the social media platform where the data was collected */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the social media post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the social media post was published */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the social media post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_data_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the machine learning model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model that made the prediction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency related to the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
